name: John Pizzarelli
description: American jazz guitarist, vocalist, songwriter and bandleader
abstract: John Paul Pizzarelli Jr. (born April 6, 1960) is an American jazz guitarist and vocalist.

about_quotes.speaker: Jane Monheit
about_quotes.evidence: John Pizzarelli is on the record... I’ve been on tours with them and recorded with them and done all kinds of stuff with these guys before.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jane Monheit interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, August 20, 2010

about_quotes.speaker: Shelly Berg
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] I think of John Pizzarelli in that vein. He’s found a niche there I think. [INTERVIEWEE] Yeah and there’s a whole hipster thing starting to happen with Kurt Elling, Patricia Barber, people like that...
about_quotes.doc_title: Shelly Berg interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 15, 2000

about_quotes.speaker: Herb Ellis
about_quotes.evidence: And oh, Bucky Pizzarelli’s son John, John Pizzarelli. He’s kind of a star now, he sings, you know, he’s getting really popular. And he plays real good.
about_quotes.doc_title: Herb Ellis interviewed by Michael Woods, Los Angeles, California, September 3, 1995 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Metz Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: Bucky still does, and John Pizzarelli. Every picture I see on FaceBook of John Pizzarelli he’s wearing a suit.
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Metz Jr. interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, October 3, 2015

about_quotes.speaker: Alan Raph
about_quotes.evidence: I do John Pizzarelli when he uses a big band, we have a couple of things coming up next month
about_quotes.doc_title: Alan Raph interviewed by Monk Rowe, Danbury, Connecticut, November 20, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Lou Pallo
about_quotes.evidence: they play John Pizzarelli and Ella Fitzgerald and stuff like that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lou Pallo interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 14, 2007
